packages.name: cron
packages.description: Deterministic global scheduler object: a job is one due datetime + one stamped message to one allowlisted target; trust-gated, persistent via injectable store, retry/backoff

packages.name: browse
packages.description: Allowlist-capped web browser object for agents: render/click/type/back with compact replies (context-bloat safe), off-cage redirect containment

packages.name: metrics
packages.description: Fire-and-forget operational counters object: closed key allowlist, in-memory totals, periodic flush to an injectable durable store
